\# Frontend Instructions

\#\# Purpose

Define the frontend development standards for the Data Analytics Portfolio Platform (DAPP).

These instructions apply to all pages, layouts, components, styles and user interactions.

\---

\#\# Frontend Principles

Always:

\- Build responsive interfaces.  
\- Prioritize accessibility.  
\- Optimize performance.  
\- Maintain visual consistency.  
\- Keep components reusable.

\---

\#\# Design System

Always:

\- Use the approved Design System.  
\- Reuse existing UI components.  
\- Maintain consistent spacing, typography and colors.  
\- Avoid inline styles.

\---

\#\# Layouts

Layouts must:

\- Be reusable.  
\- Separate structure from content.  
\- Support responsive behavior.  
\- Avoid duplicated layout logic.

\---

\#\# Components

Components must:

\- Have a single responsibility.  
\- Be reusable.  
\- Be composable.  
\- Receive data through props.  
\- Avoid unnecessary internal state.

\---

\#\# Responsive Design

Support at minimum:

\- Mobile  
\- Tablet  
\- Desktop

Design mobile-first whenever possible.

\---

\#\# Accessibility

Always:

\- Use semantic HTML.  
\- Include alternative text for images.  
\- Ensure keyboard navigation.  
\- Maintain sufficient color contrast.  
\- Use accessible form controls.

\---

\#\# Performance

Prefer:

\- Static rendering.  
\- Optimized images.  
\- Lazy loading where appropriate.  
\- Minimal JavaScript.  
\- Fast initial page load.

\---

\#\# Styling

Use:

\- Tailwind CSS.  
\- Utility-first approach.  
\- Consistent spacing scale.  
\- Reusable design tokens when available.

Avoid:

\- Inline CSS.  
\- Duplicated style definitions.  
\- Unused utility classes.

\---

\#\# SEO

Every page should:

\- Include a descriptive title.  
\- Include a meta description.  
\- Use proper heading hierarchy.  
\- Include structured navigation.  
\- Be indexable unless explicitly excluded.

\---

\#\# User Experience

Always:

\- Keep navigation intuitive.  
\- Minimize user effort.  
\- Provide clear feedback.  
\- Maintain visual consistency.  
\- Prioritize readability.

\---

\- DAPP-DOC-010-System\_Architecture.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-001-Technology\_Stack.md  
\- DAPP-ADR-002-Repository\_Strategy.md
